creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: romain->portmgr

I finally got the time to check the failure.  It happends that I simply forgot 
to check this port and it's only dependency was also failing.  Just to be sure: 
the last Exp-run had a single failing port (devel/hyena) and all ports 
depending on this one where not tested, all the rest was Okay ?  Or was the run 
aborted when the failure occured ? 

In other word, now that the failing port and it's dependency are Okay, can I 
commit everything or should we better do another exp-run? 

Thanks!
